headline: Estée Lauder outperforms on Wall Street, buoyed by analyst upgrade
summary: Estée Lauder shares outperformed the US stock market on Friday following an Overweight initiation by analysts at Piper Sandler, who highlighted the gaining momentum of the cosmetics group's...
